narrative: US-Iran ceasefire expiry risk and Strait of Hormuz closure concerns dominate the weekend tape — crude bid likely to sustain AUD, CAD through the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1767; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 158.58; BoJ meeting on 28 Apr may pressure USD/JPY. Into the Tokyo open, watch for USD/JPY and AUD/USD reactions.
